steps.title: Find the main verb
steps.content: In the relative clause, "traces" is already the finite verb: the digital resource traces the history of musical genres. The blank appears between commas, so it needs a nonfinite modifier explaining how the resource traces that history, not another full verb.

steps.title: Use a participial modifier
steps.content: Choice A, "integrates," Choice B, "is integrating," and Choice D, "has integrated," are all finite verb forms. Any of them would compete with "traces" in the same clause without a conjunction. Choice C, "integrating," forms a participial phrase that fits between the commas and modifies the action of tracing. The answer is C.
